calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION
Off Calendar Apr-30-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Shane Dunne appearing plaintiff in pro per.
Summer Nastich for defendant 367 Church Street HOA.

Mr. Dunne contests the courts tentative ruling. Hearing held. Argued. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION is DENIED. Moving party failed to carry their burden to show probability of prevailing on the merits and irreparable harm.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b)
Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action While Arbitration Is Pending
Off Calendar Apr-30-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Shane Dunne appearing plaintiff in pro per.
Summer Nastich for defendant 367 Church Street HOA.

Mr. Dunne contests the courts tentative ruling. Hearing held. Argued. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

is OFF CALENDAR. Notice of withdrawal on file.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Young; Not Reported. (D501)
